title: Ceva Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Ceva Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Ceva Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Delhi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ceva Logistics India:
Ceva Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ceva Logistics India!
